{"user_message": {"title": "ADR-0001 Test Harness — RE-IMPLEMENTED & GREEN (28 tests, 0 fail, ~263ms)", "content": "## Verdict
**Done — implemented, not just scoped.** The ADR-0001 plan (5 tasks · 11 pts) is fully built against `local-seo-agency`, the suite is green, typecheck is clean, and the real rank-drop defect is fixed.

## ⚠️ Reset detected — stale memory corrected
Memory recorded ADR-0001 as "IMPLEMENTED & green" from an earlier run. **The actual workspace did not match:** at the start of this run `package.json` had no `test` script, `tsx` was absent, `src/features/rankings/rank.ts` did not exist, and there were zero `*.test.ts` files. The prior implementation was not persisted in this tree. I re-implemented from the ADR rather than trusting memory — empirical state wins.

## What shipped
| # | Task | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | Test runner | `tsx@^4.22.3` devDep + `"test": "node --import tsx --test \"src/**/*.test.ts\""` |
| 2 | `format.ts` tests | `src/lib/format.test.ts` — 19 tests |
| 3 | Extract `rankDelta()` | `src/features/rankings/rank.ts`; `KeywordTable.tsx` refactored to consume it |
| 4 | `rankDelta` tests + defect fix | `src/features/rankings/rank.test.ts` — 9 tests |
| 5 | NaN-guard decision | Resolved (see below) |

```chart
Tests passing: 28
Tests failing: 0
Suite runtime ms: 263
```

## Edge cases covered (not happy-path)
- **`formatSignedCurrency` U+2212 minus** — asserts the exact typographic minus `−` AND asserts the output contains no ASCII hyphen. `-0` → `$0.00` (no sign).
- **Half-expand rounding** — `formatCurrency(1.005)` → `$1.01`; `formatCurrency(1234.5, false)` → `$1,235`.
- **NaN / very large** — `$NaN`, `NaN%`, `$1,234,567.89` grouping all pinned.
- **`rankDelta`** — improve / drop / flat, ±99 swings, and non-finite inputs → `flat`/0.

## Real defect fixed (Task 4)
`KeywordTable.tsx` previously rendered rank **drops** (`now > prev`) identically to *no change* (`—`) — a keyword that lost rank looked unchanged. Now drops render **`↓ N` in `text-danger`**, improvements `↑ N` in success, flat `—`. A regression test asserts drops never collapse to `—`. No drop row exists in current mock `data.ts`, so the live dashboard is visually unchanged today; the fix is latent-correct.

## NaN-guard decision (Task 5 — resolved)
- **`format.ts`: pinned, NOT changed.** Tests document that `$NaN`/`NaN%` currently leak to the UI. A display guard is deferred — changing money/percent rendering needs product input; I won't silently alter it.
- **New `rankDelta`: guarded.** Non-finite input returns `flat`/0 so new code can't render garbage.

## Verification
- `npm test` → **28 pass / 0 fail** in ~263 ms (Node v24.12.0).
- `tsc --noEmit` → clean (fixed an import-extension snag: tests import `./format` / `./rank` extensionless to satisfy strict tsc).
- ADR updated: `docs/adr/ADR-0001-test-harness-and-pure-logic-coverage.md` (Implementation addendum, 2026-05-27).

**One item for sign-off:** Task 4 changes rendered dashboard output for any future down-move row (`↓ N` in red). Approve below before this reaches production UI.", "content_type": "success", "priority": "normal"}}

{"knowledge_annotation": {"scope": "global", "note": "When using node --test via tsx on a TS-strict project, test files must use EXTENSIONLESS relative imports (import from './format', not './format.ts'). The .ts extension runs fine under tsx at runtime but tsc --noEmit fails with TS5097 unless allowImportingTsExtensions is enabled. Keep imports extensionless to satisfy both.
